data.body:
KIND-CONFUSION security fix (660 LLM-Review -1, 3rd op-cert security finding) COMPLETE. Bound the attestation kind into the signed op-cert subject digest (opcert.opcert_subject_digest/build_opcert_statement/sign_opcert/verify_opcert now take kind), threaded through signing.sign_opcert_manifest (derives kind from manifest[0]), trusted_env.verify_required_environment, and verify_opcert CLI. Added kind-confusion regression test (cert signed plan-review fails verify as completion-verifier -> mismatch; same-kind certifies). Distributed the fix into all 4 owning commits via stack rebuild (reset-to-649 + replay, applying each file at its owning commit; Change-Ids I01d9/I705d/I6b3d/I0866 all preserved). 35 op-cert tests pass; lint+typecheck clean at each commit. Re-pushed all 4 (649/650/660/664 new patchsets). Full make test running b8j7xa5wh.
Note: 660 Verified -1 earlier was a grounding fail-open flake (timeout vs parse_error); 664/660 Verified were flakes (perf/grounding) — new patchsets re-run CI.
660 LLM-Review -1 (kind-confusion) should now clear (kind bound in signed subject).
